message:
fix(fm-layout): apply clippy lints and improve API signatures

Replace sort() with sort_unstable() where order of equal elements is
irrelevant, use .clone() instead of .as_ref().cloned(), prefer .copied()
over .cloned() for Copy types, remove unnecessary .clone() calls on
values not used after the move, use dx.hypot(dy) instead of manual
euclidean distance calculation, and change finalize_specialized_layout
to accept borrowed slices (&[usize]) instead of owned Vec<usize> to
avoid unnecessary ownership transfer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
